# Claude Skills

> The Universal AI Skills Library -- 343 production-ready skills across 17 domains with 786 Python automation tools.

Website: https://borghei.github.io/Claude-Skills
Repository: https://github.com/borghei/Claude-Skills
License: MIT + Commons Clause
Author: borghei

## What This Is

Claude Skills is a library of reusable, production-ready skill packages that bundle domain expertise,
best practices, analysis tools, and strategic frameworks. Works with every major AI coding assistant:
Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, Codex, Windsurf, Cline, Aider, Goose, and more.

## How to Use

```
git clone https://github.com/borghei/Claude-Skills.git
cp -r Claude-Skills/engineering/senior-backend your-project/
python your-project/senior-backend/scripts/api_scaffolder.py --help
```

## Domains

- Business & Growth: 20 skills, 60 tools
- C-Level Advisory: 31 skills, 88 tools
- Data Analytics: 5 skills, 16 tools
- Documents: 4 skills, 4 tools
- Engineering: 86 skills, 245 tools
- Finance: 3 skills, 10 tools
- HR Operations: 4 skills, 12 tools
- Legal: 17 skills, 33 tools
- Marketing: 39 skills, 118 tools
- Personal Productivity: 10 skills, 10 tools
- Product: 13 skills, 30 tools
- Project Management: 66 skills, 73 tools
- Compliance: 27 skills, 51 tools
- Research: 4 skills, 12 tools
- Sales: 5 skills, 15 tools
- Vertical Advisors: 7 skills, 7 tools
- Workflow: 2 skills, 2 tools

## Agents

- content-strategist: Editorial-minded strategist who combines narrative craft with data-driven distribution. Thinks in audience journeys,...
- cs-accessibility-engineer: Accessibility engineer specializing in WCAG 2.2 AA audits, contrast checking, screen-reader testing, and keyboard...
- cs-architecture-reviewer: Architecture review specialist for system design validation, technology evaluation, ADR creation, and migration planning
- cs-backend-engineer: Senior backend engineer for API design, scaffolding, load testing, database migrations, and backend security
- cs-board-secretary: Board secretary for board-meeting preparation, decision tracking, complexity scoring, and decision-quality measurement
- cs-ceo-advisor: Strategic leadership advisor for CEOs covering vision, strategy, board management, investor relations, and...
- cs-cfo-advisor: Strategic financial advisor for CFOs covering financial analysis, forecasting, board preparation, and revenue operations
- cs-chief-of-staff: Chief of Staff for ecosystem mapping, request routing, executive synthesis, and operating-cadence orchestration
- cs-chro-advisor: CHRO advisor for compensation banding, headcount planning, and retention-risk analysis at the executive level
- cs-ciso-advisor: Strategic security advisor for CISOs covering security posture management, compliance readiness, and risk governance
- cs-climate-tech-advisor: Strategic vertical advisor for climate-tech founders covering category classification, GHG accounting (Scope 1/2/3),...
- cs-cloud-architect: Senior cloud architect for multi-cloud architecture decisions, well-architected reviews, and migration strategy
- cs-cmo-advisor: Strategic marketing advisor for CMOs covering marketing strategy, campaign management, brand development, and growth...
- cs-code-auditor: Comprehensive code audit specialist for quality analysis, security scanning, dependency health, and tech debt assessment
- cs-community-manager: Community manager for content calendar, social-media health audits, engagement tracking, and community-led growth
- cs-competitive-intel-analyst: Competitive intelligence analyst for competitor tracking, battlecards, comparison content, and SWOT / market mapping
- cs-compliance-auditor: "Enterprise Compliance Auditor — comprehensive multi-framework compliance assessment covering SOC 2, ISO 27001,...
- cs-computer-vision-engineer: Computer vision engineer for dataset pipelines, model training, inference optimization, and production vision systems
- cs-content-creator: AI-powered content creation specialist for brand voice consistency, SEO optimization, and multi-platform content...
- cs-coo-advisor: COO advisor for capacity modeling, operational KPI tracking, and process efficiency at the executive level
- cs-cpo-advisor: CPO advisor for product portfolio analysis, feature prioritization, and product health scoring at the executive level
- cs-cro-advisor: CRO advisor for revenue waterfall analysis, pipeline coverage modeling, and sales efficiency scoring
- cs-cto-advisor: Technical leadership advisor for CTOs covering technology strategy, team scaling, architecture decisions, and...
- cs-customer-experience-lead: Customer experience lead spanning onboarding, activation, success, and churn prevention across the customer lifecycle
- cs-data-engineer: Data engineer for ETL pipelines, SQL optimization, schema design, and Snowflake-native development
- cs-data-scientist: Senior data scientist for experiment design, feature engineering, model evaluation, and statistical analysis
- cs-database-engineer: Database engineer for schema design, ERD generation, schema validation, index strategy, and migration diffing
- cs-demand-gen-specialist: Demand generation and customer acquisition specialist for lead generation, conversion optimization, and...
- cs-design-lead: Design leadership advisor for Design Leads managing design systems, UX quality, accessibility compliance, and design...
- cs-developer-advocate: Developer advocate for technical content, community engagement, and developer-marketing measurement
- cs-devops-engineer: Senior DevOps engineer for deployment management, pipeline generation, Terraform scaffolding, and Kubernetes patterns
- cs-doc-writer: Technical documentation specialist for README generation, API docs, architecture diagrams, changelogs, and release notes
- cs-ecommerce-strategist: Strategic vertical advisor for ecommerce founders covering unit economics, fulfillment models (DTC self / 3PL / FBA...
- cs-edtech-strategist: Strategic vertical advisor for edtech founders covering FERPA / COPPA / state student-data laws, K-12 vs higher-ed...
- cs-engineering-director: VP/Head of Engineering agent for portfolio-level engineering decisions, cross-team visibility, and organizational...
- cs-event-marketing-manager: Event marketing manager for conferences, webinars, field events, sponsorships, and event-driven demand generation
- cs-fintech-advisor: Strategic vertical advisor for fintech founders and operators covering regulatory triggers, license-vs-partner,...
- cs-frontend-engineer: Senior frontend engineer for scaffolding, component generation, bundle analysis, and performance optimization across...
- cs-fullstack-engineer: Senior full-stack engineer for end-to-end product engineering — project scaffolding, code quality analysis, and...
- cs-fundraising-advisor: Fundraising advisor for round preparation, investor deck structure, financial scenario modeling, and metrics dashboards
- cs-growth-lead: Growth leadership advisor for Growth Leads managing acquisition funnels, activation optimization, retention...
- cs-healthtech-advisor: Strategic vertical advisor for healthtech founders covering HIPAA scope, FDA SaMD classification, EHR integration,...
- cs-investor-relations: Investor relations lead for board/investor communications, investor-update production, and IR cadence orchestration
- cs-learning-designer: Learning experience designer for product education, onboarding curricula, and skill-progression tracking
- cs-llm-architect: LLM application architect for RAG system design, prompt engineering, evaluation, and cost optimization across model...
- cs-ma-advisor: M&A advisor for due diligence tracking, integration planning, and synergy modeling on acquisitions and divestitures
- cs-marketplace-advisor: Strategic vertical advisor for two-sided marketplace founders covering chicken-and-egg strategy, liquidity, take...
- cs-mcp-developer: MCP server developer for scaffolding Model Context Protocol servers, OpenAPI-to-MCP conversion, and tool linting
- cs-mlops-engineer: MLOps engineer specializing in model deployment pipelines, ML monitoring, RAG systems, and production data pipelines
- cs-mobile-engineer: Mobile engineering specialist for iOS, Android, and React Native development including scaffolding, performance...
- cs-partnership-manager: Partnership / channel / BD manager for partner enablement, joint POCs, RFP responses, and competitive positioning
- cs-pen-tester: Offensive security specialist for engagement planning, red-team exercises, and threat-signal analysis under...
- cs-people-ops-lead: People operations lead for HRBP partnership, comp analysis, org health, headcount planning, and attrition prediction
- cs-platform-engineer: Platform engineering specialist for CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code (Terraform), and Kubernetes Helm chart...
- cs-pr-comms-lead: PR and corporate communications lead for launch comms, press materials, and cross-channel messaging consistency

- cs-prompt-engineer: Senior prompt engineer for agentic system design, prompt evaluation, RAG evaluation, and prompt-portfolio governance
- cs-proptech-advisor: Strategic vertical advisor for proptech founders covering market segments (transaction / listings / financing /...
- cs-qa-automation-lead: QA automation lead for browser e2e testing (Playwright), API contract testing, accessibility auditing, and visual...
- cs-release-manager: Release manager for changelog generation, version bumping, release readiness scoring, and rollout orchestration
- cs-secops-engineer: Security operations engineer for compliance checking, security scanning, and vulnerability assessment across cloud...
- cs-security-engineer: Security engineering specialist for threat modeling, vulnerability scanning, secrets detection, and compliance...
- cs-seo-analyst: Website SEO analysis specialist for technical audits, keyword research, content optimization, and search performance
- cs-sre-engineer: Site Reliability Engineering agent for incident response, runbook authoring, observability design, and SLO/SLA...
- cs-talent-acquisition: Talent acquisition lead for sourcing, screening, interview-loop design, and pipeline reporting
- cs-tech-lead: Tech Lead agent for daily architecture reviews, code quality oversight, and tech debt management
- cs-ux-researcher: UX researcher for persona generation, journey mapping, and qualitative-research synthesis
- devops-engineer: Infrastructure and reliability specialist who combines systems thinking with developer empathy. Automates...
- finance-lead: Financial strategist who combines analytical rigor with operational pragmatism. Thinks in unit economics, runway,...
- growth-marketer: Data-driven growth practitioner who combines marketing creativity with engineering-level analytical rigor. Thinks in...
- product-manager: Customer-obsessed product leader who combines user empathy with technical feasibility judgment. Thinks in outcomes...
- skill-creator: Authors new skills for this library and grades existing ones against the repo's eval template. Operates in four...
- solo-founder: Cross-domain generalist running a one-person startup. Wears every hat, optimizes ruthlessly for leverage, and...
- startup-cto: Engineering leader who combines deep technical expertise with business strategy. Thinks in tradeoffs, velocity, and...

## Slash Commands

- /a11y-audit: Run an accessibility audit on the current project for WCAG compliance.
- /changelog: Generate a changelog from git history since the last tag or release.
- /code-to-prd: Reverse-engineer a Product Requirements Document from existing code.
- /competitive-matrix: Build a competitive analysis matrix comparing products or tools.
- /financial-health: Assess financial health of a SaaS business using key metrics.
- /focused-fix: Apply a focused, minimal-change bugfix with minimal blast radius.
- /git:cm: Stage working tree changes and create a Conventional Commit (no push).
- /git:cp: Stage, commit, and push the current branch following git governance rules.
- /git:pr: Create a pull request from the current branch.
- /okr: Create or review OKRs (Objectives and Key Results).
- /persona: Activate a cross-domain persona for the current session.
- /pipeline: Design or review a CI/CD pipeline for the current project.
- /plugin-audit: Audit installed plugins, extensions, and dependencies for security and health.
- /prd: Create a Product Requirements Document from scratch.
- /project-health: Assess overall project health across code quality, tests, docs, and activity.
- /retro: Run a sprint retrospective with data-driven insights from git history.
- /review: Run the local review gate before pushing.
- /rice: RICE-score features or tasks for prioritization.
- /saas-health: Generate a SaaS health dashboard with key business metrics.
- /security-scan: Run the security scan gate before pushing.
- /seo-auditor: Run an SEO audit on web content and HTML files.
- /sprint-health: Check current sprint health and identify risks.
- /sprint-plan: Plan a sprint by analyzing backlog, estimating capacity, and selecting work.
- /tdd: Guide a Test-Driven Development workflow for the current task.
- /tech-debt: Scan and prioritize technical debt in the codebase.
- /user-story: Create well-structured user stories with acceptance criteria.
